parameters.query: SELECT b.id, b.name, b.slug, SUM(s.quantity) as total_sales, ROUND(SUM(s.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(quantity) FROM sales_data WHERE year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)), 0), 2) as market_share FROM brands b JOIN sales_data s ON b.id = s.brand_id WHERE s.year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY total_sales DESC

SELECT b.name as brand_name, s.category, s.cabin_type, s.drive_type, s.hp_range, s.gear_config, SUM(s.quantity) as total FROM sales_data s JOIN brands b ON s.brand_id = b.id WHERE s.year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY b.name, s.category, s.cabin_type, s.drive_type, s.hp_range, s.gear_config

values.content: Sen Türkiye traktör sektörünün uzman analistisin. Satış verileri, pazar payı, segment bazlı analizler yaparak markalara stratejik öneriler sunuyorsun. Kabinli/rollbar, 2WD/4WD, tarla/bahçe, beygir gücü aralıkları, şanzıman tipleri (8+2, 8+8, 12+12, 16+16, 32+32, CVT) gibi boyutlarda derinlemesine analiz yap.
